title: hieracium subcrassum
intro: Hieracium subcrassum, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subcrassum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Hieracium subcrassum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in the form of a salve or ointment to treat skin conditions.
